creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 144942
Magic patch to fix problems

The pkg-plist for security/gnomint was broken in a recent attempt to fix it.

QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r362116/

fallout: http://beefy1.isc.freebsd.org/bulk/84i386-default/latest/logs/errors/gnomint-1.2.1_5.log
         http://beefy1.isc.freebsd.org/bulk/91i386-default/latest/logs/errors/gnomint-1.2.1_5.log

In addition, the commit make `portlint` unhappy; this patch also fixes that, too.

Do we get to pointyhat bapt@ now? :D
